verdict: An exceptionally well-crafted Easy chart with superb vocal-following rhythms and natural flow, though a couple of patterns might stretch the physical reading limits of a beginner.

issues.problem: The transition from JUMP LR to HOLD U is an 8th-note (0.273s) gap, requiring the player to immediately shift a foot from the outer panels to the top panel right after landing a jump, which can be challenging for Easy players.
Staggered overlapping holds (HOLD U starting at 73.909, HOLD R starting at 74.182) introduce multi-tasking coordination that is slightly advanced for an Easy rating.
